conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the most connected to E because we shared personal details about our jobs and specific goals for our families, which made our motivations feel very aligned. I also felt a strong bond with I and H since we explicitly discussed forming an alliance and protecting each other's interests. Conversely, I felt the least connected to J, who was noticeably more guarded and admitted to keeping their cards close to their chest.

I made informal agreements with I and H to stick together and share information to ensure we all walk away with something. I trust E the most because of our sincere exchange, but I am wary of J’s strategic caution and haven't fully decided if I can rely on them yet.
